name: Plumbing
title: AI Tools for Plumbing Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for plumbers — catch emergency calls 24/7, draft estimates, and follow up on every quote. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: A burst pipe at midnight doesn't leave a voicemail and wait. It calls the next plumber. We build the tools that make sure that plumber is you.
drains: Emergency calls coming in after hours and on weekends
Quotes that never get a follow-up when the customer goes quiet
Dispatch scramble when two emergencies land at once
The owner answering the phone from under a sink

tools.title: 24/7 emergency line
tools.body: An AI receptionist picks up every call, day or night. It books routine work, gathers the details on emergencies, and pages your on-call tech for the real ones — so a 2 AM burst pipe becomes your job, not the next guy's.

tools.title: Quote follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every estimate gets a polite, well-timed nudge if the customer goes quiet. No more $4k repipe jobs lost because everyone got busy and forgot to circle back.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: Job notes in, a clean draft estimate out — fixtures, labor, your standard markups. You review and send in minutes instead of building each one from a blank page.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: A single text each morning: today's calls, crew assignments, callbacks owed, and yesterday's numbers. The whole day in one glance.

cases.context: A 7-truck plumbing shop with no after-hours dispatcher.
cases.before: Around 30% of after-hours leads went to faster competitors; mornings started with a queue of cold leads.
cases.after: Every form and missed call answered in under two minutes — booked or held warm, 24/7.
cases.impact: Representative result: ~$14,000/month in recovered jobs that used to go to whoever called back first.

cases.context: A residential plumber whose quotes rarely got followed up.
cases.before: Estimates went out and then sat — no one tracked which prospects had gone cold.
cases.after: Automatic, friendly follow-ups on every open quote until the customer decides.
cases.impact: Representative result: a meaningful lift in quote-to-close rate with zero extra owner effort.

faq.q: Does the AI sound like a real person on the phone?
faq.a: Yes. The voice receptionist is trained on your business and your tone. It handles the easy questions, books appointments, and routes anything urgent or unusual to a real person right away.

faq.q: What about emergency calls in the middle of the night?
faq.a: That's exactly what it's built for. The assistant gathers the key details, decides whether it's a true emergency, and pages your on-call tech — so you stop losing high-value emergency work to voicemail.

faq.q: Will it work with Jobber or ServiceTitan?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of the scheduling and CRM tools you already use. You won't have a new platform to learn — your existing one just gets smarter.
